requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection Requirements for BESS Power Conversion System (PCS / Storage Inverter)
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统并网要求（储能变流器/PCS侧）
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統並網要求（儲能變流器／PCS側）

summary.en: BESS storage inverters (PCS) connecting to Polish and EU grids must comply with EN 50549-1 (low voltage, ≤16 A/phase) or EN 50549-2 (medium voltage), which specify requirements for generating plants up to 75 kVA and above connected in parallel with the public distribution network, including voltage/frequency ride-through, reactive power capability, anti-islanding, and reconnection limits. PSE (Polskie Sieci Elektroenergetyczne, the Polish transmission system operator) issues grid connection conditions for large installations; URE (Urząd Regulacji Energetyki, the Energy Regulatory Office) oversees licensing and market access. Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 (Requirements for Generators, RfG) sets binding requirements for power-generating modules above member-state thresholds. Poland's grid is 230/400 V 50 Hz.
summary.zh: 接入波兰及欧盟电网的储能变流器（PCS）须符合EN 50549-1（低压，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中压）标准，规定了并联接入公共配电网的发电装置（≤75 kVA及以上）的电压/频率穿越、无功功率能力、孤岛保护及重新并网要求。PSE（波兰输电系统运营商Polskie Sieci Elektroenergetyczne）为大型装置发放并网条件；URE（波兰能源监管局）负责许可与市场准入监管。欧盟委员会法规（EU）2016/631（发电机要求，RfG）对超过成员国规定阈值的发电模块设定具有约束力的要求。波兰电网为230/400 V、50 Hz。
summary.zht: 接入波蘭及歐盟電網的儲能變流器（PCS）須符合EN 50549-1（低壓，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中壓）標準，規定了並聯接入公共配電網的發電裝置（≤75 kVA及以上）的電壓／頻率穿越、無功功率能力、孤島保護及重新並網要求。PSE（波蘭輸電系統運營商Polskie Sieci Elektroenergetyczne）為大型裝置發放併網條件；URE（波蘭能源監管局）負責許可與市場准入監管。歐盟委員會法規（EU）2016/631（發電機要求，RfG）對超過成員國規定閾值的發電模組設定具有約束力的要求。波蘭電網為230/400 V、50 Hz。

standards_or_laws: PSE (Polskie Sieci Elektroenergetyczne) grid connection conditions for large BESS installations
URE (Urząd Regulacji Energetyki) — Energy Regulatory Office licensing requirements

summary.en: In China, grid-connected storage inverters (PCS) are governed primarily by GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System), which superseded GB/T 34120-2017. The 2023 revision extended the AC output voltage upper limit to 35 kV, added fault ride-through (LVRT/HVRT) and primary frequency response requirements, and updated product classification. GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Power Station Connected to Power System) is sometimes referenced for inverter grid-connection behaviour. The National Energy Administration (NEA) and grid companies (State Grid / Southern Grid) also issue enterprise standards (Q/GDW series) for energy storage grid connection.
summary.zh: 中国并网储能变流器（PCS）主要依据GB/T 34120-2023《电化学储能系统储能变流器技术要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017），规定了PCS的电气性能、并网保护、孤岛检测及通信接口要求。2023年修订版将交流输出电压上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次调频要求，并更新了产品分类。GB/T 19964-2024《光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定》有时也被参考用于逆变器并网行为。国家能源局及电网企业（国家电网/南方电网）还发布Q/GDW系列企业标准用于储能并网。
summary.zht: 中國並網儲能變流器（PCS）主要依據GB/T 34120-2023《電化學儲能系統儲能變流器技術要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017），規定了PCS的電氣性能、並網保護、孤島檢測及通信接口要求。2023年修訂版將交流輸出電壓上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次調頻要求，並更新了產品分類。GB/T 19964-2024《光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定》有時亦被參考用於逆變器並網行為。國家能源局及電網企業（國家電網／南方電網）還發布Q/GDW系列企業標準用於儲能並網。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34120-2023 — Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System (SAMR/SAC; supersedes GB/T 34120-2017; recommended national standard)
Q/GDW 1564-2014 (State Grid enterprise standard — current supersession status not publicly confirmable; verify with State Grid or SAC for any post-2020 revision)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 34120 is not accepted as equivalent to EN 50549-1/-2 for EU market access. PCS units exported from China must be re-tested and re-certified to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 by a recognised test laboratory, and must satisfy PSE/URE grid-connection conditions in Poland. The EU RfG Regulation (2016/631) is directly applicable law in all EU member states including Poland; Chinese type-test reports against GB/T 34120 are not substitutable. Key technical gaps include different voltage/frequency ride-through profiles, reactive power Q(U) curves, reconnection delay settings, and communication protocol requirements. Poland's grid voltage of 230/400 V differs from China's 220/380 V baseline despite the shared 50 Hz frequency.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 34120不被欧盟市场认可为EN 50549-1/-2的等效标准。从中国出口的储能变流器须经认可检测实验室重新测试并取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2认证，并须满足波兰PSE/URE的并网接入条件。欧盟法规（EU）2016/631在包括波兰在内的所有欧盟成员国具有直接法律效力，依据GB/T 34120出具的中国型式试验报告不可替代。主要技术差距包括：电压/频率穿越曲线不同、无功功率Q(U)曲线不同、重新并网延迟设置不同，以及通信协议要求不同。波兰电网电压230/400 V与中国220/380 V基线不同，尽管频率同为50 Hz。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 34120不被歐盟市場認可為EN 50549-1/-2的等效標準。從中國出口的儲能變流器須經認可檢測實驗室重新測試並取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2認證，並須滿足波蘭PSE/URE的併網接入條件。歐盟法規（EU）2016/631在包括波蘭在內的所有歐盟成員國具有直接法律效力，依據GB/T 34120出具的中國型式試驗報告不可替代。主要技術差距包括：電壓／頻率穿越曲線不同、無功功率Q(U)曲線不同、重新並網延遲設置不同，以及通訊協定要求不同。波蘭電網電壓230/400 V與中國220/380 V基線不同，儘管頻率同為50 Hz。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EN 50549-1/-2 are harmonised standards supporting the Low Voltage Directive / relevant national grid codes; EU RfG 2016/631 is directly binding EU law in Poland. PSE grid connection conditions and URE licensing are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in Poland.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for grid connection in China — GB/T 34120-2023 is a recommended national standard (推荐性国标) but compliance is effectively required by State Grid / Southern Grid connection rules.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese PCS / storage inverters certified only to GB/T 34120 are NOT compliant for EU/Polish grid connection. Full re-testing to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 and satisfaction of PSE/URE grid-connection conditions are required before connecting to any Polish grid point. Note that Poland's 230/400 V grid differs from China's 220/380 V — firmware and protection settings must be re-parameterised. Engage an accredited EU test laboratory and a Polish grid-connection consultant early in the product development cycle.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅依据GB/T 34120认证的中国储能变流器不符合欧盟/波兰并网要求。在接入任何波兰电网节点之前，须完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2的完整重新测试，并满足PSE/URE并网接入条件。注意波兰电网230/400 V与中国220/380 V不同——固件和保护设置须重新参数化。建议在产品开发周期早期联系经认可的欧盟检测实验室及波兰并网咨询机构。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅依據GB/T 34120認證的中國儲能變流器不符合歐盟/波蘭並網要求。在接入任何波蘭電網節點之前，須完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2的完整重新測試，並滿足PSE/URE併網接入條件。注意波蘭電網230/400 V與中國220/380 V不同——韌體和保護設置須重新參數化。建議在產品開發週期早期聯繫經認可的歐盟檢測實驗室及波蘭併網諮詢機構。
